calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Sacramento City Unified School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Sacramento City Unified School District is Monday, August 18, 2025. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Sacramento City Unified School District in 2025-2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Sacramento City Unified School District is Thursday, June 11, 2026. The school year runs from August through June, covering 188 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is spring break 2025-2026 for Sacramento City Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring break for Sacramento City Unified School District runs Mar 30, 2026–Apr 3, 2026, 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2025-2026 for Sacramento City Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Sacramento City Unified School District runs Dec 22, 2025–Jan 2, 2026, 12 days. School resumes Jan 5, 2026.

yearNumbers.label: More Instructional Days
yearNumbers.detail: SCUSD schedules 188 instructional days — 8 more than the California state minimum of 180 — unusually high for a large urban district.

yearNumbers.label: Lincoln's Birthday
yearNumbers.detail: Lincoln's Birthday is observed as a standalone school holiday on February 9, in addition to Presidents' Day — two no-school Mondays one week apart in February.

calendarNotes: Sacramento City Unified begins the 2025–2026 school year on August 18, 2025 — earlier than most Bay Area districts. Spring Break runs March 30–April 3, 2026. The school year ends June 11, 2026.
